generator.prompt_or_run_reference: User requested branch creation and submission codex_gpt-5-5_noskill

gistemp-zonal-lines.alt_text: Line chart of centered five-year rolling temperature anomalies from 1882 onward for the northern extratropics, tropics, and southern extratropics, with a dashed zero-anomaly reference line.

world-bank-urbanization-bars.alt_text: Horizontal bar chart showing 2024 urban population percentages for seven World Bank regions in the supplied ascending order, with every bar directly labeled.

palmer-penguins-box.alt_text: Box plots compare body mass in grams for Adelie, Chinstrap, and Gentoo penguins, with all supplied observations overlaid as jittered points.

wine-correlation-heatmap.alt_text: Heatmap of the complete UCI red-wine Pearson correlation matrix on a shared negative-to-positive scale from -1 to 1, with all variable labels visible.

auto-mpg-scatter.alt_text: Scatter plot of every supplied vehicle's weight in pounds against fuel economy in miles per gallon, with points grouped by USA, Europe, and Japan origin.

usgs-earthquake-histogram.alt_text: Histogram of reviewed 2025 USGS magnitude 5 and larger earthquake events using 0.1-magnitude bins, with bar heights normalized to percentage of events.
